title: The California Artificial Intelligence Transparency Act (CAITA) protects consumers by giving them the ability to determine if materials have been generated by AI
prompt_preview:

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The California Artificial Intelligence Transparency Act (CAITA) protects consumers by giving them the ability to determine if materials have been generated by AI.",
    "CAITA requires large generative artificial intelligence (GenAI) system providers to label AI-generated images, videos, and audio with visible and imperceptible, embedded disclosures.",
    "CAITA provides an AI-detection tool for users to query whether content was created by AI.",
    "CAITA enforces third-party licensees to prevent undisclosed content publication to the extent technically feasible.",
    "AI-generated images, audio, and video could be used for spreading political misinformation and creating deepfakes.",
    "CAITA advances provenance, transparency, and accountability in AI-generated content.",
    "CAITA emphasizes the importance of disclosure and consumer awareness regarding AI in product creation.",
    "CAITA marks a significant step toward establishing clear guidelines for AI-generated products."
  ]
}
```
